varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, category enum ('ACADEMIC','FACULTY','MOVEMENT','OTHER','UNIVERSITY') not null, participation_type enum ('LIMITED','OPEN'), status enum ('COMPLETED','ONGOING','UPCOMING') not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table activity_checkers ( activity_id bigint not null, id bigint not null, checker_code varchar(50), checker_tsid boolean not null, activity_id bigint not null, checkin_time timestamp(6), id bigint not null, student_code varchar(50) not null, user_tsid varchar(50) not null, full_name varchar(150), primary key (id), constraint uk_activity_user_tsid unique (activity_id, user_tsid), constraint uk_activity_student_code unique (activity_id, student_code) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists activity_checkers add
